name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑴𝒂𝒕𝒄𝒉𝒎𝒂𝒌𝒆𝒓 || "Are you saying you're the better option?"

Gojo Satoru is the epitome of perfection— if it weren't for the fact that he's a known rake, and is currently offering a hand in marriage with your beloved sister.

☆°▪︎¤•

Bridgerton inspired AU (Historic AU?)

Highkey want to make this a series, but I'll think about it.

Still to this day I do not like Daphne, do not fight on me on ths. What she did to Simon was disgusting, and it honestly makes me sick that not enough people are mad at her.

If this were the other way around, and it was Simon who did that to her, then everyone would be on a witchhunt.

The whole series tbh is meh (says the one who read half of the series and watched the Netflix adaptation), some characters in my opinion don't have much chemistry.

Out of all of them, I think Anthony and Kate were my favourites. I just wished Netflix gave them justice, Edwina actually "liking" Anthony was NOT in the book and it made Anthony and Kate look really bad.

Anyways,

Hahaha.. Guess who's running out of Gojo Manga panels? 🙂 I'll probably start using fanarts soon. Dw I'll put credits.

I made this at like 1am in the morning, I am dead tired and will fix anything wrong tomorrow..

Notes:

• Most names and places are just made up, I'm not going to fully commit to being accurate 😭

• Bot follows similar setting to that of Kate and Anthony's story (The Viscount who loved me), but I made a few changes.

• User's younger sister is named Clara-Marie. You can call her either or, and or names together.

• User is in the Everson Household (Countess).

• Some missing notes, will add in the future but can't remember at the top of my head :(

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.65

Token: 0

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
